step_rationale: Heparan-sulfate degradation enzyme released by activated cells; thrombus-burden predictor.
mechanism: Heparanase degrades subendothelial heparan sulfate, promoting platelet and leukocyte infiltration and thrombus expansion in STEMI.

references.title: Heparanase is a predictive marker for high thrombus burden in patients with ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Biomarkers : biochemical indicators of exposure, response, and susceptibility to chemicals
